summary: Phase 2 testing completed successfully. All CRUD operations for Campaigns, CAIWAVE TV Streams, and Subsidized Uptime are working. Admin login with admin@caiwave.com/admin123 verified. Navigation includes all Phase 2 links. Landing page CAIWAVE TV section displays correctly.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - charts may not render properly on initial load. Non-blocking but should be fixed for better UX.
